title: Scrimba Help Centre
description: Common questions and support documentation

title: Can I download the code in a scrim?

title: Do I keep my progress even if I cancel my subscription?

title: Do your lessons have captions?
description: Yes, it does! Our system has native built-in captions for our lessons. Captions can be controlled by the "CC" button located in the lower left of the lesson env

title: Do you offer student discounts?
description: Yes, we do! If you have an academic email, please email help@scrimba.com for a student discount, and we'll get that processed for you.

title: Can I purchase a single course instead of subscribing?
description: To access our Pro courses, you will need to start a Scrimba subscription. It is no longer possible to buy standalone courses one-off.

title: Do I get to keep my Pro courses after I cancel my subscription?
description: If you unsubscribe, you’ll retain access to Pro courses until the end of your current billing cycle. Even after canceling, your Pro access remains active for an

title: Do I get access to all courses when I subscribe?
description: Yes, when you purchase a subscription, you get access to ALL content on Scrimba for as long as you subscribe. This means you can enroll in all the courses, boot

title: My automatic payment failed. What do I do?
description: If your subscription payment failed (e.g. you didn't have funds in your account when we attempted to charge your card), you will lose access to the Pro courses.

title: Where can I find free courses?
description: To find free courses, go to https://scrimba.com/courses and toggle the “free” filter.

title: Can I change the language of the lesson?
description: No, not at the moment. All our official lessons are currently only available in English. We are working to implement an inbuilt translation tool in the future.

title: Can I watch courses offline?
description: No, Scrimba doesn’t support offline mode, so you need an internet connection to watch courses.
